auth: This requires signing in. Add your Hugging Face token in Settings, then try again.
gated: This repository is gated. Request access on the Hub — once it's granted, try again.
network: Could not reach the Hugging Face API. Check your connection and proxy settings, then try again.
notFound: Not found on the Hub — it may have been moved, renamed, or made private.
rateLimit: The Hugging Face API is rate-limiting requests. The app backs off and retries automatically — please wait a moment before trying again.
unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
server: The Hugging Face API returned a server error. Please try again in a moment.

boundary.title: This view stopped unexpectedly
boundary.body: Reload the app to restore the view. If the problem continues, copy the redacted details for a bug report.
